creator: martin.laabs@mailbox.tu-dresden.de
text:
While processing the test programs there is a linker error:

[...]
cc -o sel_spd.o -c -fvisibility=hidden    -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe  -pipe -fPIC  -UDEBUG  -DNDEBUG=1 -DHAVE_VISIBILITY_HIDDEN_ATTRIBUTE=1 -DHAVE_VISIBILITY_PRAGMA=1 -DXP_UNIX=1 -DFREEBSD=1 -DHAVE_BSD_FLOCK=1 -DHAVE_SOCKLEN_T=1 -DHAVE_SOCKLEN_T=1 -DHAVE_LCHOWN=1 -DHAVE_STRERROR=1 -D_REENTRANT=1 -D_THREAD_SAFE=1  -DFORCE_PR_LOG -D_PR_PTHREADS -UHAVE_CVAR_BUILT_ON_SEM -I../../dist/include/nspr -I../.././../pr/include -I../.././../pr/include/private  ../.././../pr/tests/sel_spd.c
cc  sel_spd.o -pthread -Xlinker -R /usr/ports/devel/nspr/work/nspr-4.7/mozilla/nsprpub/build/pr/tests/../../dist/lib -L../../dist/lib -lplc4 -L../../dist/lib -lnspr4  -o sel_spd
/usr/lib/libpthread.a(thr_exit.o)(.text+0x20): In function `_thread_exit':
: multiple definition of `_thread_exit'
sel_spd.o(.text+0x940): first defined here
/usr/bin/ld: Warning: size of symbol `_thread_exit' changed from 85 in sel_spd.o to 63 in /usr/lib/libpthread.a(thr_exit.o)
gmake: *** [sel_spd] Fehler 1
gmake: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/devel/nspr/work/nspr-4.7/mozilla/nsprpub/build/pr/tests'
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/nspr.
su:/usr/ports/devel/nspr$

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/deve/nspr
make all
make test
